name: rung_27_robustness_hard_midstream_query_repair
utterances: Faye is the parent of Glen.
Glen is the parent of Hope.
Hope is the parent of Iris.
If X is a parent of Y then X is an ancestor of Y.
If X is an ancestor of Y and Y is an ancestor of Z then X is an ancestor of Z.
Before any repair, is Faye an ancestor of Iris?
That center edge needs correction, so retract parent(glen, hope).
Replace it with this: Glen is the parent of Jude.
Jude is the parent of Hope.
After that repair, is Faye an ancestor of Iris now?
